description:
Local Markdown & Mermaid viewer.

HopsMD is a lightweight, offline-first reader for Markdown documentation
with live MermaidJS diagram rendering. It is a side project of the
CloudBrew family — brewed with Tauri v2 + Angular 21 — and themed
throughout with a love letter to a properly poured pint of beer.
HopsMD v1.2.0
Local Markdown & Mermaid viewer — a CloudBrew side project.
Install
winget (after the manifest is merged into winget-pkgs):
winget install CloudBrew.HopsMD
Manual: download the MSI or NSIS installer below.
> First-time users may see a SmartScreen warning ("Unbekannter
> Herausgeber"). Click Weitere Informationen → Trotzdem ausführen
> — the installer is unsigned during the MVP phase. SignPath.io OSS
> signing is on the roadmap.
See CHANGELOG.md for what's new.
